mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_voting_execution_package ( tenant_id, business_type, business_reference_id, proposal_snapshot_type, proposal_snapshot_id, proposal_snapshot_hash, rule_snapshot_type, rule_snapshot_id, rule_snapshot_hash, scope, scope_reference_id, collection_mode, duplicate_ballot_policy, status, vote_start_at, vote_end_at, created_by_user_id, version ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{businessType}, #{businessReferenceId}, #{proposalSnapshotType}, #{proposalSnapshotId}, #{proposalSnapshotHash}, #{ruleSnapshotType}, #{ruleSnapshotId}, #{ruleSnapshotHash}, #{scope}, #{scopeReferenceId}, #{collectionMode}, #{duplicateBallotPolicy}, #{status}, #{voteStartAt}, #{voteEndAt}, #{createdByUserId}, #{version} )
mapper.sql: package_id, tenant_id, business_type, business_reference_id, proposal_snapshot_type, proposal_snapshot_id, proposal_snapshot_hash, rule_snapshot_type, rule_snapshot_id, rule_snapshot_hash, scope, scope_reference_id, collection_mode, duplicate_ballot_policy, status, vote_start_at, vote_end_at, package_hash, electorate_snapshot_id, created_by_user_id, frozen_by_user_id, frozen_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_voting_execution_package WHERE package_id = #{packageId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT p.package_id, p.tenant_id, p.business_type, p.business_reference_id, p.proposal_snapshot_type, p.proposal_snapshot_id, p.proposal_snapshot_hash, p.rule_snapshot_type, p.rule_snapshot_id, p.rule_snapshot_hash, p.scope, p.scope_reference_id, p.collection_mode, p.duplicate_ballot_policy, p.status, p.vote_start_at, p.vote_end_at, p.package_hash, p.electorate_snapshot_id, p.created_by_user_id, p.frozen_by_user_id, p.frozen_at, p.version FROM t_voting_package_subject ps INNER JOIN t_voting_execution_package p ON p.package_id = ps.package_id WHERE ps.subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_voting_package_subject(package_id, tenant_id, subject_id) VALUES (#{packageId}, #{tenantId}, #{subjectId})
mapper.select: SELECT subject_id FROM t_voting_package_subject WHERE package_id = #{packageId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY subject_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot ( snapshot_id, roster_id, room_id, building_id, certified_area, representative_opid, representative_uid, co_owner_uids, row_hash ) VALUES
(#{snapshotId}, #{item.rosterId}, #{item.roomId}, #{item.buildingId}, #{item.certifiedArea}, #{item.representativeOpid}, #{item.representativeUid}, CAST(#{item.coOwnerUidsJson} AS JSONB), #{item.rowHash})
mapper.select: SELECT snapshot_id, package_id, tenant_id, scope, scope_reference_id, total_area, total_owner_count, item_count, aggregate_hash, frozen_at FROM t_voting_electorate_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT snapshot_item_id, snapshot_id, roster_id, room_id, building_id, certified_area, representative_opid, representative_uid, co_owner_uids::text AS co_owner_uids_json, row_hash FROM t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} ORDER BY building_id, room_id
mapper.update: UPDATE t_voting_execution_package SET status = #{status}, package_hash = #{packageHash}, electorate_snapshot_id = #{electorateSnapshotId}, frozen_by_user_id = #{frozenByUserId}, frozen_at = #{frozenAt}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE package_id = #{packageId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT delivery.delivery_id AS deliveryId, delivery.package_id AS packageId, delivery.electorate_item_id AS electorateItemId, delivery.tenant_id AS tenantId, delivery.delivery_channel AS deliveryChannel, delivery.delivery_method AS deliveryMethod, delivery.evidence_hash AS evidenceHash, delivery.delivered_by_user_id AS deliveredByUserId, delivery.delivered_at AS deliveredAt, electorate.representative_opid AS representativeOpid, electorate.representative_uid AS representativeUid FROM t_voting_delivery_record delivery JOIN t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot electorate ON electorate.snapshot_item_id = delivery.electorate_item_id WHERE delivery.package_id = #{packageId} AND delivery.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY delivery.delivery_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_voting_ballot_record ( package_id, subject_id, vote_id, electorate_item_id, tenant_id, vote_channel, package_hash, ballot_file_hash, signature_hash, recorded_by_user_id, cast_at, supersedes_ballot_id, resolution_policy, resolution_reason ) VALUES ( #{packageId}, #{subjectId}, #{voteId}, #{electorateItemId}, #{tenantId}, #{voteChannel}, #{packageHash}, #{ballotFileHash}, #{signatureHash}, #{recordedByUserId}, #{castAt}, #{supersedesBallotId}, #{resolutionPolicy}, #{resolutionReason} )
mapper.select: SELECT ballot.ballot_id AS ballotId, ballot.package_id AS packageId, ballot.subject_id AS subjectId, ballot.vote_id AS voteId, ballot.electorate_item_id AS electorateItemId, ballot.tenant_id AS tenantId, electorate.representative_opid AS representativeOpid, electorate.representative_uid AS representativeUid, ballot.vote_channel AS voteChannel, ballot.package_hash AS packageHash, ballot.ballot_file_hash AS ballotFileHash, ballot.signature_hash AS signatureHash, ballot.recorded_by_user_id AS recordedByUserId, ballot.cast_at AS castAt, ballot.supersedes_ballot_id AS supersedesBallotId, ballot.resolution_policy AS resolutionPolicy, ballot.resolution_reason AS resolutionReason FROM t_voting_ballot_record ballot JOIN t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot electorate ON electorate.snapshot_item_id = ballot.electorate_item_id WHERE ballot.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND ballot.electorate_item_id = #{electorateItemId} AND ballot.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ballot.valid_flag = 1

SELECT ballot.ballot_id AS ballotId, ballot.package_id AS packageId, ballot.subject_id AS subjectId, ballot.vote_id AS voteId, ballot.electorate_item_id AS electorateItemId, ballot.tenant_id AS tenantId, electorate.representative_opid AS representativeOpid, electorate.representative_uid AS representativeUid, ballot.vote_channel AS voteChannel, ballot.package_hash AS packageHash, ballot.ballot_file_hash AS ballotFileHash, ballot.signature_hash AS signatureHash, ballot.recorded_by_user_id AS recordedByUserId, ballot.cast_at AS castAt, ballot.supersedes_ballot_id AS supersedesBallotId, ballot.resolution_policy AS resolutionPolicy, ballot.resolution_reason AS resolutionReason FROM t_voting_ballot_record ballot JOIN t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot electorate ON electorate.snapshot_item_id = ballot.electorate_item_id WHERE ballot.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND ballot.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ballot.valid_flag = 1 ORDER BY ballot.ballot_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_voting_non_response_derivation ( package_id, subject_id, electorate_item_id, tenant_id, representative_opid, representative_uid, certified_area, non_response_policy, derived_choice, delivery_evidence_hash, rule_snapshot_hash, reason_code, row_hash, derived_at ) VALUES
(#{row.packageId}, #{row.subjectId}, #{row.electorateItemId}, #{row.tenantId}, #{row.representativeOpid}, #{row.representativeUid}, #{row.certifiedArea}, #{row.nonResponsePolicy}, #{row.derivedChoice}, #{row.deliveryEvidenceHash}, #{row.ruleSnapshotHash}, #{row.reasonCode}, #{row.rowHash}, #{row.derivedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT derivation_id AS derivationId, package_id AS packageId, subject_id AS subjectId, electorate_item_id AS electorateItemId, tenant_id AS tenantId, representative_opid AS representativeOpid, representative_uid AS representativeUid, certified_area AS certifiedArea, non_response_policy AS nonResponsePolicy, derived_choice AS derivedChoice, delivery_evidence_hash AS deliveryEvidenceHash, rule_snapshot_hash AS ruleSnapshotHash, reason_code AS reasonCode, row_hash AS rowHash, derived_at AS derivedAt FROM t_voting_non_response_derivation WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY electorate_item_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_voting_execution_audit ( package_id, tenant_id, event_type, from_status, to_status, actor_user_id, detail, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{packageId}, #{tenantId}, #{eventType}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actorUserId},
CAST(#{detailJson} AS JSONB) NULL , #{occurredAt} )
